ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration And Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for Robert Armstrong.

Ms. Lofdahl stated that she has the petition for Final Distribution and the Substitution of Attorney and that she will file them today. In addition, Ms, Lofdahl explained the reason for opening the Estate, stated that everything was passed through the Trust and that there was nothing in the Estate. The Court directed Ms. Lofdahl to return with the endoresed copies at which time the matter will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
